steps.title: Identify what the question is asking for
steps.content: The task is to emphasize when and where Mariposa Dorada debuted. Both temporal (2019) and geographic (Havana, Cuba) details must be front and center — not buried or omitted.

steps.title: Eliminate choices that miss the when or the where
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'In 2019, Grimanesa Amoros debuted *Mariposa Dorada* in Havana, Cuba.': Opens with “2019” and explicitly names “Havana, Cuba” — both the when and where are the focus. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Artist Grimanesa Amoros often works with light in her sculptures, which tend to be large in scale.': Describes the artist's general style; omits the debut year and location entirely. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Grimanesa Amoros is a Peruvian American artist who often works with LED light in her large-scale sculptures, such as *Mariposa Dorada* (2019).': Mentions 2019 only parenthetically and omits the location Havana, Cuba. ✗
  • Choice D — 'As is common of Grimanesa Amoros's sculptures, the entangled red and white LED tubes of *Mariposa Dorada* cut an imposing 19,250-cubic-foot figure when the piece debuted.': Focuses on physical scale and materials; omits both the year and the location of the debut. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
